root_cause.description: InlineAiTrigger called trpc.ai.keySettingsStatus.useQuery on every AnomalyCard (12 cards in md:hidden mobile view, in DOM on all viewports). TanStack Query's httpBatchLink batched this with events.list + clusters.live + clusters.list + metrics.currentStats + alerts.unacknowledgedCount = 6 procedures in one batch URL. The deployed Nginx proxy returned 404 for this long comma-separated batch path. ALL queries in the batch failed. TanStack Query's retry logic (max 3 retries) fired rapid state updates. React's concurrent scheduler was saturated processing these updates. Navigation startTransition never completed. pushState was never called. URL stayed on /anomalies.
confirmed_by: pushState interceptor: installed but never called after Dashboard link click
element.click() JS trigger: DID navigate successfully (bypasses pointer events)
kubectl logs: confirmed individual queries (clusters.list, metrics.currentStats) return 200 but batch returns 404
root_cause.secondary_issue: InlineAiPanel motion.div had pointerEvents:'none' in initial/animate/exit animation states (added in commit 7f6d2e8). With Motion v12.34 + React 19 concurrent rendering, this caused pointer event interference on the 12 hidden AnomalyCard panels. Removed as defensive fix.

changes.InlineAiTrigger.tsx: Removed trpc.ai.keySettingsStatus.useQuery entirely. AI trigger always renders enabled. If no AI key configured, contextChat mutation returns error message handled by InlineAiPanel. Eliminates the query from the batch → batch no longer fails → navigation restored.
changes.InlineAiPanel.tsx: Removed pointerEvents from motion animation states (initial/animate/exit). height:0 + overflow:hidden is sufficient for hiding. No pointer event interference.

deploy_note: Needs Docker build + helm upgrade to take effect. Previous v192-fix image still has the bug. New image from this commit will fix navigation.
mai_re_test: Navigation from /anomalies should work after deploy. keySettingsStatus no longer in batch. Batch URL reverts to events.list,clusters.live,clusters.list,metrics.currentStats,alerts.unacknowledgedCount → 5 procedures, same as before ai.keySettingsStatus was added.
